property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 in;node_modules;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%MAVEN_HOME% in;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;C:\Program Files\allure-2.36.0 in;C:\Usersashm\AppData\Local
vm;C:
vm4w
odejs;C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\Usersashm\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Usersashm\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Usersashm\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Usersashm\AppData\Local
vm;C:
vm4w
odejs;C:\Usersashm\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1 in;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Add two numbers", "Addition of two numbers"](1)
testcase.system-out: @Addition Scenario: Add two numbers # src/test/resources/AdditionOf2Numbers.feature:4 Starting scenario: Add two numbers ✔ Given I have two numbers 6 and 7 # StepDefinitions.AdditionSteps.i_have_two_numbers(int,int) ✔ When I add them # StepDefinitions.AdditionSteps.i_add_them() Result: 13 ✔ Then the result should be 13 # StepDefinitions.AdditionSteps.the_result_should_be(int) Finished scenario: Add two numbers
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify status code for GET /users endpoint", "User API Validation"](2)
runScenario["Verify user details for a specific user", "User API Validation"](3)
testcase.system-out:
@Api Scenario: Verify user details for a specific user # src/test/resources/Api.feature:11 ✔ Given the base URI is "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com" # StepDefinitions.ApiSteps.setBaseURI(java.lang.String) HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sat, 25 Apr 2026 04:40:13 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true Cache-Control: max-age=43200 etag: W/"1fd-+2Y3G3w049iSZtw5t1mzSnunngE" expires: -1 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=7ZrGpNkaj9GfftNsoHuoLMB2zSah79nWPpIvfFxbSrU%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1776335395"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=7ZrGpNkaj9GfftNsoHuoLMB2zSah79nWPpIvfFxbSrU%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1776335395" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 999 x-ratelimit-reset: 1776335405 Age: 7454 cf-cache-status: HIT Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9f1aab19a833696d-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "id": 1, "name": "Leanne Graham", "username": "Bret", "email": "Sincere@april.biz", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 556", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874", "geo": { "lat": "-37.3159", "lng": "81.1496" } }, "phone": "1-770-736-8031 x56442", "website": "hildegard.org", "company": { "name": "Romaguera-Crona", "catchPhrase": "Multi-layered client-server neural-net", "bs": "harness real-time e-markets" } } ✔ When I send a GET request to "/users/1" # StepDefinitions.ApiSteps.sendGETRequest(java.lang.String) ✔ Then the response status code should be 200 # StepDefinitions.ApiSteps.validateStatusCode(int) ✔ And the response field "id" should be 1 # StepDefinitions.ApiSteps.validateIntegerField(java.lang.String,int) ✔ And the response field "username" should be "Bret" # StepDefinitions.ApiSteps.validateStringField(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid credentials", "Login functionality"](4)
testcase.system-out: @Login @Sanity Scenario Outline: Login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/LoginScenarioOutline.feature:14 ✔ Given user is on the website login page # StepDefinitions.LoginScenarioOutlineSteps.user_is_on_login_page() ✔ When user enters valid "student" and valid "Password123" # StepDefinitions.LoginScenarioOutlineSteps.user_enters_valid_username_and_password_outline(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And user clicks on the submit button # StepDefinitions.LoginScenarioOutlineSteps.user_clicks_on_submit_button() ✔ Then user should be navigated to the home page # StepDefinitions.LoginScenarioOutlineSteps.user_should_be_navigated_to_success_page()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with invalid credentials", "Login functionality"](5)
testcase.system-out: @Login @Regression @Smoke Scenario Outline: Login with invalid credentials # src/test/resources/LoginScenarioOutline.feature:24 ✔ Given user is on the website login page # StepDefinitions.LoginScenarioOutlineSteps.user_is_on_login_page() ✔ When user enters invalid "wrongUser" and invalid "wrongPassword" # StepDefinitions.LoginScenarioOutlineSteps.user_enters_invalid_username_and_password_outline(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And user clicks on the submit button # StepDefinitions.LoginScenarioOutlineSteps.user_clicks_on_submit_button() ✔ Then error message should be displayed on the page # StepDefinitions.LoginScenarioOutlineSteps.user_should_see_error_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid credentials", "Login functionality"](6)
testcase.system-out: @Smoke Scenario: Login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/login.feature:4 User is on login page ✔ Given user is on login page # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_login_page() Entered valid credentials ✔ When user enters valid username and password # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.valid_credentials() Clicked login button ✔ And clicks on login button # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.click_login() Login success ✔ Then user should be navigated to home page # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.success()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with invalid credentials", "Login functionality"](7)
testcase.system-out: @Sanity Scenario: Login with invalid credentials # src/test/resources/login.feature:11 User is on login page ✔ Given user is on login page # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_login_page() Entered invalid credentials ✔ When user enters invalid username and password # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.invalid_credentials() Clicked login button ✔ And clicks on login button # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.click_login() Login failed ✔ Then error message should be displayed # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.error()
